repair_memories_applied.natural_language: When opbuild fails in TilingFunc with error 'class optiling::Ca6k00188CustomTilingData has no member named set_*', do not use setter methods to assign tiling data; instead assign directly to the public fields (e.g., tiling.totalRows = totalRows).

When build fails in 02-build due to redefinition of 'Ca6k00045Custom' in op_proto.h caused by manual OP_ADD in host_tiling_src while autogen REG_OP already defines the operator, do not add a second registration with OP_ADD; instead remove the manual OP_ADD and rely solely on the autogen REG_OP.

repair_memories_applied.natural_language: When op_host/CMakeLists.txt fails at the opbuild macro due to a missing or misplaced tiling data field (as seen in the diff where dimAttr was absent and field order differed), do not keep the incomplete tiling data structure; instead include all required fields (dimAttr, outputTotalLength after innerDim, etc.) in the exact order that the build expects.

repair_memory_selection.selection_rationale: 84bb2c98 (ca6k_00188) directly matches the current error: opbuild TilingFunc failure due to missing members in auto-generated tiling data class (no set_* methods). 193e1ac4 (ca6k_00045) provides context on autogen tiling issues for the same ca6k operator family. 893b2208 (argmax_over_a_dimension) addresses a similar missing tiling data field (dimAttr absent) in an opbuild macro, analogous to the missing totalLength, tileLength, blockDim fields here.
